code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from"react";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function AddStudent(_ref){let{editStudent,setEditStudent}=_ref;const[student,setStudent]=useState({name:"",email:"",course:""});useEffect(()=>{if(editStudent){setStudent(editStudent);}},[editStudent]);const handleChange=e=>{setStudent({...student,[e.target.name]:e.target.value});};const handleSubmit=()=>{if(student.id){fetch(`http://localhost:9094/students/${student.id}`,{method:"PUT",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},body:JSON.stringify(student)}).then(()=>setEditStudent(null));}else{fetch("http://localhost:9094/students",{method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/json"},body:JSON.stringify(student)});}setStudent({name:"",email:"",course:""});};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Add / Update Student"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{name:"name",value:student.name,onChange:handleChange,placeholder:"Name"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{name:"email",value:student.email,onChange:handleChange,placeholder:"Email"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{name:"course",value:student.course,onChange:handleChange,placeholder:"Course"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:handleSubmit,children:"Save"})]});}export default AddStudent;
